message:
Fix(widgets): Help separator in degraded mode + JsonView indentation

Help render_short was not drawing the separator between entries when
the terminal was in degraded mode, causing entries to run together.
Now separators are drawn with Style::default() in degraded mode.

Also fixed misleading indentation in JsonView's string-value branch
that made brace matching hard to verify.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
